modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Legitimate email is being sent to the Junk folder.

full_description_text: User reports that a valid email is in the Junk folder. This is unexpected behavior. They are using Outlook in Microsoft 365. Need to check why this is happening.
short_description: Legitimate email is being sent to the Junk folder.
description: User reports that a valid email is in the Junk folder. This is unexpected behavior. They are using Outlook in Microsoft 365. Need to check why this is happening.
